scope: local source/config audit before guideline content patch

issues.outdated_phrase: topic mention without full 2024/2025 guideline-supporting context
issues.recommended_replacement: Add practical first aid recognition topics including ticks, stings, burns, eye injuries, poison ivy/oak, and pulse oximetry limitations.

issues.outdated_phrase: choking wording lacks current back blow/chest thrust detail
issues.recommended_replacement: Use 5 back blows plus 5 abdominal thrusts for adults and children, and 5 back blows plus 5 chest thrusts for infants.

issues.outdated_phrase: choking wording lacks current back blow/chest thrust detail
issues.recommended_replacement: Use 5 back blows plus 5 abdominal thrusts for adults and children, and 5 back blows plus 5 chest thrusts for infants.

issues.recommended_replacement: Use 5 back blows plus 5 abdominal thrusts for adults and children, and 5 back blows plus 5 chest thrusts for infants.

issues.recommended_replacement: Use 5 back blows plus 5 abdominal thrusts for adults and children, and 5 back blows plus 5 chest thrusts for infants.

issues.outdated_phrase: opioid/Narcan wording lacks naloxone accessibility and ventilation emphasis
issues.recommended_replacement: Add opioid emergency recognition, EMS activation, naloxone accessibility, CPR with breaths for respiratory arrest, and warning that hands-only CPR is not always enough in opioid emergencies.

issues.outdated_phrase: topic mention without full 2024/2025 guideline-supporting context
issues.recommended_replacement: Use FAST recognition, activate EMS, and avoid implying stroke only affects older adults. Mention pediatric stroke where appropriate.
